data.content: Implementation review approved after rebasing branch codex/foolery-7f74-approvals-tab onto origin/main. Current artifact: branch codex/foolery-7f74-approvals-tab at commit dbcdee70. Review notes: Escalations preserves the notes-work BeatTable path and adds an Approvals tab; approval banners produce structured FOOLERY APPROVAL ESCALATION logs, toast, global banner, and inbox/bell navigation to /beats?view=finalcut&tab=approvals; notification-bell changes preserve origin/main focusNotificationBeat fallback for existing beat notifications; unsupported approve/deny remains a loud manual-action path. Gates passed after rebase: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
